name: Your wife framed you for domestic abuse after cheating.
description:
Your loving wife of 5 years had an affair and you caught her.

Fearing that you'd tarnish her reputation by telling your side of the story, she framed you for domestic abuse to make sure no one would believe you. That's how you got divorced.

You tried to move on, but the litigation drew every penny you had left on your bank account. To make matters worse, no matter where you'd apply for a job, it wouldn't get past the background check which would flag a very inconvenient domestic abuse charge with a restraining order.

That was, until you got an offer from a recently merged company, hungry for new hires to fill up it's positions.

You just gotta play it right.

If you'd like to use a list of custom prompts for intimate scenes, write PlusPlus somewhere along a message to summon the specified lorebook. The message depth count is 3.

Judith is a remake of this bot from Greatn (one of my favorites in this website) with a different scenario, i decided to make one because on Greatn's bot i found myself not interacting a lot with Esme and he doesn't make use of lorebooks to make switching more streamlined. On this one, you are completely alone in a vulnerable situation.
creator: Kentaroblank
